name: MP7 | 金库悍匪
descriptionEn: Versatile but expensive, the German-made MP7 SMG is the perfect choice for high-impact close-range combat. Its base has been painted with a grey anodized map pattern. It looks like someone has drawn on top of the map since it was first applied. Planning is one thing, executing is another
descriptionZh: 非常好用，但价格昂贵，德国制造的 MP7 微型冲锋枪非常适合高强度的近距离作战。 枪身饰有灰色电镀地图花纹，宛如手工绘制一般。 计划是计划，执行是执行。
